name: CloudflareProviderConnection
description: Cloudflare connection supporting API Token and Legacy API Key authentication schemes, with optional R2 storage credentials.

fields.name: auth_scheme
fields.description: Authentication scheme. api_token: scoped API token; legacy_api_key: global API key + email.

fields.name: api_token
fields.description: Scoped Cloudflare API token. Required when auth_scheme=api_token.

fields.name: api_key
fields.description: Global Cloudflare API key. Required when auth_scheme=legacy_api_key.

fields.name: email
fields.description: Cloudflare account email. Required when auth_scheme=legacy_api_key.
